analysis: The project is a static website with a focus on black holes, but the current implementation lacks a cohesive and immersive black hole theme. The HTML structure is incomplete, the CSS does not fully capture the dark, cosmic aesthetic, and the JavaScript functionality is not fully implemented. The website needs a complete overhaul to align with the black hole theme, including animated visuals, interactive elements, and a dark cosmic color palette.

improvements.description: Complete the HTML structure to include sections for black hole information, interactive planets, animated slides, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.

Implement a dark cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, glowing elements, and Egyptian-themed patterns. Ensure the CSS includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme and interactive elements.
Fix syntax errors, implement mobile menu toggle functionality, add event listeners for buttons, and ensure all functions are properly implemented for interactive elements.
